surface_strategies.inputs: bg-transparent border border-[#27272A] rounded-lg focus:border-[#E63946] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E63946]

components.buttons: rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all
components.secondary_button: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-white border border-[#27272A] hover:border-[#E63946]/50 hover:bg-[#222]
components.progress_bar: h-2 bg-[#27272A] rounded-full overflow-hidden, indicator: bg-[#E63946] transition-all duration-500

placeholder_videos.description: Asian street food cooking video thumbnail

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the entire UI is in Turkish. This is a single-page SaaS utility tool.
Use 'Bricolage Grotesque' for all headings and 'Manrope' for body text. AVOID Inter, Roboto, and Space Grotesk.
DO NOT use purple or violet gradients. Stick to the Dark Ink background (#050505) with Vermilion Red (#E63946) accents to hint at Chinese seal stamps.

Implement the 6-stage pipeline (Ses Ayrıştırma -> Transkripsiyon -> Çeviri -> Seslendirme -> Senkronizasyon -> Birleştirme) using a vertical or horizontal stepper with active, completed, and pending states. Use shadcn Progress.
Build a large drag-and-drop zone for MP4/MOV uploads with dashed borders and hover states. Add clear Turkish instructions.

For the comparison section, use shadcn ScrollArea to show Chinese original text and Turkish translation side-by-side. Try to use a serif font stack for the Chinese text to emulate traditional typography.
Add a processed video preview player area with an 'MP4 İndir' download button (Primary Button style).
Implement a 'Geçmiş İşlemler' (Past Processes) list at the bottom using the provided thumbnail images in a grid layout.
Use shadcn sonner (toast) for all Turkish error and success notifications (e.g., 'Video başarıyla yüklendi', 'İşlem tamamlandı').
Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements for automated testing (e.g., `data-testid="upload-zone"`, `data-testid="download-btn"`).
